zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England於1079年6月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，她的父親Malcolm III King of Scotland48歲，母親Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland33歲。她於1100年11月11日與Henry I King of England在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1118年5月1日在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特享年38歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England于1079年6月1日出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，她的父亲Malcolm III King of Scotland48岁，母亲Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland33岁。她于1100年11月11日与Henry I King of England在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1118年5月1日在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特享年38岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Queen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Quene, sometimes a pet form of Quenill (Old English Cwēnhild, from cwēn ‘queen’ + hild ‘battle’). Early examples of the name are mainly from southern England, especially Sussex, but its currency in late medieval northern England has also been suggested by records from Yorkshire.
English: possibly a nickname from Middle English quene ‘woman; harlot; crone’ (Old English cwēn), but this is less likely than 2 to have given rise to a hereditary surname.

variants.name: McQueen
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuibhne ‘son of Suibhne’ a byname meaning ‘pleasant’. Compare McSweeney .

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuain, a Gaelic patronymic based on Old Norse sveinn ‘boy, servant’, which was also used as a personal name (see Swain ). This is given as the origin of the McQueen or McSwan family of Skye, although the spellings are hard to distinguish. Compare Whan .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
meanings: Old High German: A  mighty battle a maid, a heroine.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England was born on 1 June 1079, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Malcolm III King of Scotland, was 48 and her mother, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, was 33. She married Henry I King of England on 11 November 1100, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 1 May 1118, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England est née le 1 juin 1079, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm III King of Scotland, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Henry I King of England le 11 novembre 1100, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1118, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England am 1. Juni 1079 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malcolm III King of Scotland 48 und ihre Mutter Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland 33. Sie hat am 11. November 1100 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England Henry I King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1118 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England è nata il il 1 giugno 1079 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Malcolm III King of Scotland, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Henry I King of England il 11 novembre 1100, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1118, nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England(이)가 1079년 6월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malcolm III King of Scotland(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1100년 11월 11일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Henry I King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 5월 1일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England nasceu em 1 de junho de 1079, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm III King of Scotland, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry I King of England em 11 de novembro de 1100, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1118, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith of Scotland Queen Matilda of England родилась 1 июня 1079 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Malcolm III King of Scotland было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry I King of England 11 ноября 1100 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 мая 1118 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.
